chat.title: Chat with Saheli
chat.subtitle: Ask me anything about health 🌸
chat.welcome: Hi there! 🌺 I'm Saheli, your health companion. I'm here to help you learn about your body, health, and well-being. Feel free to ask me anything!
chat.disclaimer: 💡 This is educational information only. Please consult a healthcare provider for personalized medical advice.
chat.emptySessions: No conversations yet. Start a new chat!
chat.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this chat?

onboarding.slide1Text: Learn about your body with a friendly AI assistant that speaks your language.
onboarding.slide2Text: Monitor your menstrual cycle, symptoms, and get personalized insights.
onboarding.slide3Text: Explore health topics through quizzes, flashcards, and visual content.
